title: Privacy Policy
description: How Sunterra Solar collects, uses and protects your personal information.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.lede: How Sunterra Solar collects, uses and protects your personal information.

prose: 1. Introduction
Sunterra Solar Pty Ltd (ABN 84 612 345 678) respects your privacy under the Australian Privacy Act 1988.
2. Section 2

We collect personal information including name, contact details, property address and energy usage data solely to provide solar quotes, installations and support services. We do not sell your data. Data may be shared with DNSPs, CEC auditors and finance partners with your consent.
